creator: o.kryvulia@flex-it.com.ua
text: With external monitor attached via dock station (HDMI or DP) system freezes while loading i915kms module from latest graphics/drm-devel-kmod port. This was introduced after port upgrade to 5.7.19 and no such problem with 5.5.19. Also this problem doesn't occur when monitor attached directly to laptop (Thinkpad T490 with latest BIOS and dock firmware). However another close bug #259455 was resolved.
